conversation.message: How have you been feeling lately, overall?
A bit off. I get tired easily, and sometimes my concentration drifts. But I have no idea what is causing it.
How long have you noticed it's been harder to focus?
Maybe a month or so? It started when I finished uni. I thought I'd just get used to the routine again, but it's been a bit of a struggle.
Is it harder to focus or concentrate than it used to be?
Yeah, definitely. I can sit down to watch a movie and just zone out after five minutes.
Has this been happening with other activities, like reading or working?
Yeah, everything. I try to read a book and I just can't get past the first page. It's weird.
How have you been sleeping lately?
Not great. I wake up in the middle of the night and can't go back to sleep.
How long do you usually lie awake after waking up?
About an hour. Then I just get up and do something until I'm tired enough to sleep again.
Been doing anything you enjoy lately?
Not really. I've been meaning to get back into playing guitar, but I haven't had the energy.
What's been getting in the way of your energy for it?
Just tiredness, I guess. I don't have any specific reason to pick up the guitar, so I just haven't bothered.
When you think about the next few weeks, what do you expect day to day?
More of the same. Just trying to get through it until something changes.
What kind of change are you hoping for?
Something to give me a routine again. Maybe a job or something.
Do you find it harder to make decisions than before, even small ones?
Yeah, a bit. Like deciding what to eat for dinner. It feels like a big deal, even though it's just food.
How often does that feeling of a small choice feeling like a big deal happen?
A lot, honestly. It's probably just me being a bit dramatic.
Do you feel like you have enough energy for your usual day?
No, I don't. I usually crash after lunch.
How long does that crash typically last?
Until dinner, usually. Then I can perk up a bit.
Are you still into the things you used to care about?
I don't know. I used to love music, but now I just listen to it in the background. I don't really have the energy to go to shows or anything.
When you listen to music now, does it still feel the same as it used to?
No, not really. I used to be so into it, but now I just put it on and zone out.
Is there anything weighing on your mind that you wish you could change?
Just the job situation, I guess. It's frustrating, but I don't know what else to do.
What feels most frustrating about your job situation right now?
Just being stuck in this limbo. I don't have a job, but I'm not a student anymore. It's weird.
How do you feel about how things have gone for you recently?
A bit down, I guess. It's just weird to be 22 and not know what I'm doing.
What feels weird about not knowing what you're doing?
Just that I went to uni for three years and expected something more concrete at the end of it.
How's your appetite been?
Not great. I'm eating more snacks than actual meals.
How often would you say you're choosing snacks over meals?
Most days. I don't really have the energy to cook a proper lunch.
Have you found yourself getting emotional more easily lately?
Yeah, a bit. I get annoyed easily.
